issues.title: Swift Scaffolding and WASM Toolchain Setup
issues.context: Initialize the Swift Package Manager (SPM) structure and verify the WASM build pipeline using Carton.
issues.background: SwiftWasm requires the 'carton' tool for bundling. The project must support dual-targets: Native Mach-O and WASM.
requirements: Configure Package.swift with JavaScriptKit and SQLite.swift
Verify 'make build-mac' produces a functional binary
issues.definition_of_done: Both native and WASM build targets compile without errors.

issues.title: Core Epistemic Models and Codable Implementation
issues.context: Implement the EpistemicSignal, Proposition, and Relation models in Swift.
issues.background: These models are the 'DNA' of the system. They must be Codable to allow for JSON interop between the LLM, the DB, and the JS frontend.
requirements: Implement EpistemicSignal.swift with strict Codable support
Implement RelationType enum with assoc, disc, dep, gap
Add unit tests for JSON encoding/decoding
issues.definition_of_done: A JSON string from the LLM can be successfully decoded into a Swift EpistemicSignal struct.

issues.title: SQLite Persistence Layer (Native)
issues.context: Implement the history store using SQLite.swift for the CLI target.
issues.background: The CLI needs to store the 7-pass history. Use SHA-256 of the source text as the primary key.
requirements: Implement save/load logic for EpistemicSignal blobs
issues.definition_of_done: The CLI can persist and resume a 7-pass session from a local .db file.

issues.title: The Deterministic Auditor (Pass 7)
issues.context: Implement the Pass 7 logic in pure Swift.
issues.background: This is the 'Cybernetic Governor'. It must check for verbatim quotes and logical cycles (DAG check).
issues.definition_of_done: The Auditor correctly flags a hallucinated relation in a test suite.

issues.title: WASM Bridge and JavaScript Interop
issues.context: Expose the Deterministic Auditor to the browser via JavaScriptKit.
issues.background: The website (Conceptual Matrix Mapper v3) needs to call the Swift Auditor logic on the JSON data.
requirements: Implement JSExport logic in ECMEWasm target
Handle string conversion between Swift and JS
issues.definition_of_done: The browser console can call the WASM module and receive an audit report.

issues.title: CLI Step Machine Wrapper
issues.context: Build the CLI interface for the 7-pass protocol.
issues.background: The CLI should support 'analyze', 'replay', and 'export' commands.
requirements: Implement the 7-pass loop logic (calling LLM via URLSession)
Add color-coded terminal output for the matrix
issues.definition_of_done: Running 'ecme analyze file.txt' completes all 7 passes and saves to DB.
